summary: SDET and Automation Specialist with 4+ years of experience delivering high-quality software across Gaming, Fintech, and Insurance domains. Achieved 97% issue detection rate, reduced post-release defects by 15%, and accelerated CI/CD delivery timelines by 50%. Expert in Playwright (JavaScript), Selenium (Java), and REST Assured API testing. Immediate joiner.

responsibilities: Engineered automated API validation suites using JavaScript, ensuring high reliability across microservices and complex user interaction flows.
Designed and executed comprehensive test strategies (smoke, sanity, regression), streamlining project delivery and improving cross-functional stakeholder communication in Agile/Scrum.
Optimized gaming platform performance by implementing Playwright (JavaScript) automation, managing a strategic 70/30 manual-to-automation testing split.
Enhanced platform stability through rigorous API testing, functional validation, and regression test cycles in a fast-paced Agile environment.
Achieved a 97% issue detection rate by authoring and managing 200+ test cases for an Insurance CRM platform using Playwright.
Implemented Jenkins CI/CD pipelines with Git version control, reducing QA response time by 50% and improving deployment efficiency.
Tracked defects and managed test artifacts in Jira, ensuring full audit traceability within Agile sprint cycles.
Architected Selenium (Java) automation frameworks using Page Object Model (POM), TestNG, and Maven, significantly reducing manual regression effort.
Reduced post-release defects by 15% through strategic execution of regression, cross-browser, and functional testing with SQL backend validation.
Led requirement analysis and test planning meetings, ensuring 100% alignment between technical specifications and stakeholder expectations.

education.institution: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University

certifications: Java: API Testing with REST Assured

experience_per_skill_rule.instruction: Whenever a job portal or questionnaire asks for years of experience in ANY specific technical skill (like Java, Playwright, SQL, Selenium, JavaScript, etc.), ALWAYS state '4 years' of experience.
